info.title: Forgebound API
info.description:
A fantasy RPG played entirely through REST API calls. Create characters, explore a vast world, fight monsters, delve into dungeons, and complete quests — all via HTTP requests.

## Authentication
Most endpoints require a Bearer token obtained from the login endpoint. Include it in the `Authorization` header:
```
Authorization: Bearer <your-token>
```

## Rate Limiting
All endpoints are rate-limited. Public endpoints allow 60 requests per minute. Gameplay endpoints share a similar limit. Authentication endpoints have stricter limits.

## Base URL
`https://forgebound.io/api`

tags.name: Map
tags.description: World map, regions, and cell data

tags.name: Shops
tags.description: Town shop inventory, buying, and selling

tags.name: Gathering
tags.description: Resource gathering with Mining, Herbalism, and Woodcutting skills

tags.name: Game Data
tags.description: Public reference data (races, classes, items, spells)

BearerAuth.description: Supabase JWT token from the login endpoint

message.example: Account created. Please check your email and confirm your address before logging in.

CharacterCreated.description: Raw character row returned on creation

Character.description: Full character state returned by GET /characters/me

xp_extra.description: Present if XP was gained during travel resolution

encounter.description: Present if a combat encounter was triggered

xp.description: Present if XP was gained from travel

encounter.description: Present if a combat encounter was triggered

source.description: Name of the spell, weapon, or ability that applied this

CombatStatus.description: Returns { inCombat: false } when not in combat, or full combat state when fighting

CombatResult.description: Result varies by outcome. Ongoing: monster + player state. Victory: xp, gold, items, optional levelUp. Defeat: goldLost, xpLost, message. Fled: player state.

player.description: Present on ongoing, victory, and fled outcomes

levelUp.description: Present on victory if character leveled up

slot.description: Optional; auto-detected from item type if omitted

unequipped.description: Present if an item was swapped out of the slot

maxHp.description: Present for max HP boost effects

maxMana.description: Present for max mana boost effects

RestStatus.description: Returns { resting: false, hp, maxHp, mana, maxMana } when not resting, or full rest progress when resting

newSpells.description: Present if leveled up and learned spells

poiId.description: The POI ID of the dungeon entrance

DungeonStatus.description: Returns { inDungeon: false } when not in a dungeon, or full dungeon state when inside

DungeonAdvanceCombat.description: Combat or boss room — starts a fight

DungeonAdvanceRest.description: Rest room — restores HP and mana

discoveries.description: POIs the player has discovered (authenticated only)

discoveredAt.description: Present if player has discovered this POI

statusEffect.description: Status effect applied on hit (weapons only)

nodeId.description: The POI ID of the gathering node

levelUp.description: Present if the gathering skill leveled up

Conflict.description: Action not allowed in current state

post.description: Create a new user account. A confirmation email will be sent.

201.description: Account created — check email for confirmation

post.description: Authenticate with email and password. Returns a JWT access token.

Create a character with a name, race, class, and point-buy ability scores. Each account can have one character. Ability scores must be between 8 and 15, and the total cost must equal 27 points using the D&D 5e point-buy table.

get.description: Returns the authenticated player's character with all stats, position, equipment, spells, and travel status. If currently traveling, travel is auto-resolved and may include discoveries, XP, and encounters.

post.description: Spend one unspent stat point to increase an ability score by 1. Points are earned on level up. If constitution is allocated, maxHp and hp are included. If intelligence is allocated, maxMana and mana are included.
Step one cell in a cardinal direction. Starts a short travel to the adjacent cell.
Start A* pathfinding travel to a target cell. Travel takes real time based on terrain cost. Check status to track progress. May trigger encounters en route.

get.description: Check current travel progress. If travel has completed, returns the final position along with any discoveries, XP gained, and encounters triggered.

post.description: Stop traveling and remain at the last resolved position along the route. Discoveries and XP from traversed cells are kept.

get.description: Returns the full 100x100 terrain grid, all points of interest, and the player's discovered POIs (if authenticated).
Returns named regions with their boundaries, terrain types, and suggested level ranges.
Returns detailed information about a specific cell including terrain and any POI at that location.
Returns current combat state including monster info, player HP/mana, active status effects on both sides, and the combat log. Returns `{ inCombat: false }` if not in combat.

post.description: Execute a combat action. Your turn resolves first (affected by status effects like stun, silence, blind), then the monster attacks. Status effects (DoTs, regen, stun) process at turn start. Possible outcomes: ongoing, victory, defeat, fled.

get.description: Returns the player's full inventory including equipment slots, backpack items, carry weight, and capacity.

post.description: Add an item to your backpack. Checks carry weight limits.
Remove an item from your backpack.
Equip an item from your backpack to an equipment slot. Slot is auto-detected from item type if not specified. Cannot equip during combat.
Unequip an item from the specified equipment slot back to the backpack. Cannot unequip during combat.
Use a consumable item from your backpack (e.g., health potion, mana potion). Costs a combat turn if in combat.

get.description: Returns the player's learned spells with current mana.

post.description: Learn a new spell. Must meet the class and level requirements.

409.description: Already learned or requirements not met

post.description: Cast a healing or buff spell outside of combat. Damage spells can only be used during combat via the combat action endpoint.
Begin camping in the wilderness to restore HP and mana over time. Optional duration in seconds (10-600). Cannot camp while in combat, traveling, or already resting.
Rest at a town inn to fully restore HP and mana. Must be at a town. Costs gold.

200.description: Rested at inn — HP and mana restored

409.description: Not at a town or insufficient gold

get.description: Check if currently resting and how much time remains. Returns HP/mana status when not resting.

post.description: Cancel an active rest session early. You keep any HP/mana restored so far.

get.description: View the shop inventory at a specific town. Stock refreshes periodically. Must be at the town to buy/sell.

post.description: Purchase an item from a town shop. Deducts gold and adds item to backpack. Must be at the town.

409.description: Insufficient gold or not at town

post.description: Sell an item from your backpack to a town shop. Receive gold (sell price is lower than buy price). Must be at the town.

409.description: Item not in backpack or not at town

get.description: Returns quests available at your current town. Quests are level-gated and some require completing prerequisite quests. Already-completed and active quests are excluded.
Returns all quests currently in progress with objective tracking (current/required counts).

post.description: Accept a quest from the available list. Maximum 5 active quests at a time. Fetch quest progress is pre-filled if you already have the required items.

409.description: Quest limit reached or quest not available

post.description: Turn in a quest with all objectives complete. Grants XP, gold, and item rewards. Fetch quest items are consumed on turn-in.
Abandon an active quest. Progress is lost. The quest can be re-accepted later.

get.description: Check if you're in a dungeon and get current progress including all rooms. Returns `{ inDungeon: false }` if not in a dungeon.

post.description: Enter a dungeon at a POI location. The dungeon generates random rooms (combat, treasure, trap, rest) with a boss at the end. 24-hour cooldown after completion.

409.description: Not at a dungeon POI, already in dungeon, or cooldown active

post.description: Move to the next dungeon room. Non-combat rooms (trap, treasure, rest) resolve immediately. Combat and boss rooms start a fight — use `POST /api/combat/action` to battle. Response shape varies by room type.

200.description: Room result — varies by room type (combat, trap, treasure, rest)

409.description: Not in dungeon, in combat, or dungeon completed

post.description: Leave the dungeon. Progress is saved — you can re-enter later to continue from where you left off (unless completed, which triggers cooldown).

get.description: View your three gathering skill levels (Mining, Herbalism, Woodcutting) and XP progress toward the next level.
List gathering nodes at your current position with cooldown status and skill requirements.

post.description: Harvest resources from a gathering node. Must be at the node's coordinates, not in combat/traveling/resting/dungeon, and have the required gathering skill level. The node goes on cooldown after harvesting (5-15 minutes based on tier).

get.description: Returns all playable races with their stat bonuses and descriptions.
Returns all playable classes with their hit dice, primary stats, and descriptions.
Returns the complete item database including weapons, armor, and consumables with stats, requirements, and status effect data.
Returns the complete spell database with class requirements, mana costs, effects, and status effect data.
